positive: A stylized, highly detailed, neo-geometric print featuring a celestial mountain range intersecting with abstract cosmic flora. The composition is centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and minimal negative space. Incorporate stylized elements like crescent moons, constellations, and stylized eucalyptus leaves. The aesthetic should be high-contrast, Pacific Northwest whimsical, mixed with mid-century modern vector art influences. Limited color palette of deep teal, cream, and burnt orange on a dark background. Artwork must be suitable for seamless textile printing, featuring clean vector lines, flat color blocking, and crisp edges. Digital illustration, perfect for apparel print, high resolution, concept art.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, signature, watermark, logo, artifact, noise, bad anatomy, cropped, jpeg artifacts, dirty, muddy, poor composition, gradient, realism, photorealism
